sourceMovie.title: RocknRolla
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto RocknRolla (2008) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Run All Night
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If RocknRolla clicked for you, Run All Night (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after RocknRolla?
faq.answer: Try Run All Night, Swordfish, The International—each shares DNA with RocknRolla while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is RocknRolla?
faq.answer: RocknRolla (2008) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is RocknRolla worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
